description: The Chinook music store wants to implement a customer rewards program. Modify the 'Customer' table in the Chinook database to include a 'LoyaltyTier' column (VARCHAR). Populate this column for all customers based on their total spending (sum of 'Total' from the 'Invoice' table) using these tiers: Platinum for spending over $45.00, Gold for spending between $40.00 and $45.00 inclusive, and Silver for spending under $40.00.
